name: COMMUNITY TRUST BANCORP INC /KY/
business: Community Trust Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company that, through its subsidiaries, offers commercial and personal banking and trust and wealth management services to small and mid-sized communities in Kentucky, southern West Virginia, and northeastern Tennessee.
sellsTo: small and mid-sized communities in Kentucky, southern West Virginia, northeastern Tennessee

exposures.sentence: A breach in the security of our systems could disrupt our business, result in the disclosure of confidential information, damage our reputation, and create significant financial and legal exposure for us.

As financial services become increasingly dependent on technology, permitting transactions to be conducted by telephone, mobile banking, and the internet, non-bank institutions are able to attract funds and provide lending and other financial services without offices located in our market areas.
Our business may be adversely impacted by climate change and related initiatives.

catalysts.event: New branch opening in Mt. Sterling Market
catalysts.sentence: In an attempt to modernize our delivery channel in the Mt. Sterling Market, we consolidated two of our branches into a newly constructed modern branch which opened in February 2026.
